name: Chicken Gorgonzola
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Zucchini, cut into small slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, lightly sauté the garlic, rosemary, and peppercorns.
2. Set aside in a container.
3. In the same pan, cook the onions and sugar in the butter until the onions are browned. Remove from heat.
4. Charbroil the chicken and zucchini, basting with the olive oil mixture until the chicken is completely cooked (do not overcook the zucchini).
5. Place the chicken breasts along with the butter mixture, zucchini, and remaining oil mixture in a casserole dish.
6. Sprinkle the Gorgonzola on top of the chicken.
7. Bake for 2-4 minutes, until the cheese is well melted.
